infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to provide live translation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs microphone access to listen and translate speech in real time.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Live Translator to access your microphone for real-time speech translation.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Live Translator to use speech recognition for live translation.
